[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01111111 7
1 11111110 7
2 01011110 5
3 00111101 5
4 11100111 6
5 01110111 6
6 01011110 5
7 01010000 2

56 65 01111101 6
67 76 10111111 7
70 07 11101110 6

13 31 01110111 6 match 5
24 42 11111111 a

71 17 10100111 5
